title: erodium triangulare var. affine
intro: Erodium triangulare var. affine, also known as the Storksbill, is a plant species belonging to the Geranium family (Geraniaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erodium triangulare var. affine include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, with the flowers and leaves often being dried and used as a herbal remedy.
